name: the-artists-way
description: Julia Cameron's The Artist's Way — creativity recovery toolkit using Morning Pages, Artist Dates, and a 12-week program to unblock creative expression and reclaim your artistic self
useCase: Start Morning Pages, overcome creative blocks, silence the inner critic, nurture your artist through weekly dates, and complete a 12-week creative recovery
knownRisks: The spiritual framing (God/Great Creator) may not resonate with all readers
The 12-week program requires significant daily commitment
Morning Pages may amplify anxiety in some users before clearing it
